overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's urban environment at night. The journey traverses narrow neon-lit alleys, industrial underpasses with burning debris, busy street intersections, and commercial sidewalks with futuristic storefronts and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with vending machines and neon shop fronts

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in white tank top through a narrow alley lined with green vending machines on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top and jeans walking ahead of ego through the alley

entered.detail: row of illuminated green vending machines lining the left wall of the alley
colorful neon signage for shops on the right side of the alley
tall concrete walls enclosing the narrow passage on both sides

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed alley at night, illuminated by green neon vending machines on the left and shop signs on the right. The camera follows a pedestrian in a white tank top walking ahead through the concrete corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass with burning debris and emergency lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from green neon to red emergency glow as entering the industrial section
passing through metal security gates into darker industrial underpass beneath the highway

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark industrial passage with red emergency lighting, passing burning debris on the right

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near the burning barrel on the right side

entered.detail: green metal security gate marking the transition between alley sections
metal barrel with open fire and smoke providing red illumination
street sign reading 'Ferguson' mounted on the left wall
underside of the elevated highway creating a roof over the passage

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a metal gate into an industrial underpass beneath an elevated highway. The environment shifts to red emergency lighting with a burning trash barrel on the right, while the street sign 'Ferguson' becomes visible on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection under elevated highway with vehicle traffic

events.description: exiting the enclosed underpass into open street intersection beneath the overpass
crossing the asphalt road at zebra crosswalk while vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: exiting the alley and crossing a city street under an elevated highway, navigating around passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving through the intersection past the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and ramp of the elevated highway dominating the scene
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
illuminated traffic signals showing green for vehicles

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a wide intersection beneath the elevated highway. The character crosses the zebra-striped crosswalk as vehicles pass by, with the massive concrete overpass structure overhead and traffic lights visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with restaurants and neon storefronts

events.description: turning onto commercial sidewalk with illuminated storefronts and restaurant signage
passing the Pizza Padoru restaurant and continuing along the pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along a commercial sidewalk passing neon-lit storefronts including a pizza restaurant and various shops

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket and purple shorts walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: restaurant storefront with illuminated 'Pizza Padoru' signage and warm interior lighting
large pink holographic billboard mounted on the building facade
wide concrete pedestrian walkway lined with street lamps and storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a commercial sidewalk lined with neon-lit storefronts. The Pizza Padoru restaurant is prominent on the left with its illuminated signage, while pedestrians walk along the path and vehicles pass on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian street with construction barriers and Asian-inspired red lanterns

events.description: entering pedestrian-only street section with construction barriers and hanging red lanterns

agents.ego_description: continuing down a pedestrian street lined with construction barriers on the left and red lanterns overhead, following a pedestrian with a red beanie

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing red beanie and dark jacket walking ahead through the pedestrian zone

entered.detail: orange and white striped construction barriers lining the left side of the walkway
traditional red paper lanterns hanging from building facades on the left
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows and neon accents rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a pedestrian street decorated with hanging red paper lanterns and construction barriers on the left. The character follows a pedestrian wearing a red beanie toward a towering cyberpunk skyscraper visible in the distance, with various storefronts and benches along the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic urban corridor that gradually opens into a sprawling, neon-lit commercial district. It begins in a narrow alley illuminated by green vending machines and shop signs, following a pedestrian in a white tank top through the concrete space. As the character passes through a metal gate, the environment shifts into a dim industrial underpass characterized by red emergency lighting and a burning trash barrel. The scene then expands into a wide intersection beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, where the camera crosses a zebra-striped crosswalk amidst passing traffic. Finally, the path turns onto a commercial sidewalk past the illuminated signage of a Pizza Padoru restaurant, moving through a street decorated with red paper lanterns toward a towering skyscraper in the distance.
